title: Verdict
description: Common shape emitted by BOTH Rule Bench (A2, L4-rule-bench) and LLM Bench (A1, L4-llm-bench). L5 TRUST RECONCILE (A1) consumes a merged list of these, keyed by pair_id and source.

confidence.description: For rule_bench: 1.0 if clear verdict, 0.5 if ESCALATE, 0.0 if no signal. For llm_bench: the model's self-reported confidence.

rule_signal.description: Present when source=rule_bench. Same value as confidence, kept as its own field because L5's trust formula (architecture doc §4.1) names it explicitly.

evidence.description: A2 addition: the deterministic basis for the rule_bench verdict, so it's auditable.

rule_fired.description: Name of the deterministic rule that produced this verdict, e.g. 'near_identical_text', 'contradictory_action_same_scope', 'differing_mandated_period'.
